services.description: Browse our full range of fitness and recovery services: personal training, physical therapy, massage therapy, boxing, kettlebell courses, and online training. Gym or in-home in NYC.

trainers.description: Meet our elite team of certified personal trainers and Doctor of Physical Therapy. CPT-certified coaches specializing in strength, mobility, boxing, and rehabilitation in NYC.

trainers.description_es: Conoce a nuestro equipo élite de entrenadores certificados y Doctor en Terapia Física. Coaches CPT especializados en fuerza, movilidad, boxeo y rehabilitación en NYC.

blog.title: Fitness Blog | Training Tips, Nutrition & Recovery | A1 Training Group
blog.description: Expert fitness advice from NYC's top trainers. Articles on strength training, nutrition, recovery, sleep, mindset, and kettlebell techniques.

blog.description_es: Consejos de fitness de los mejores entrenadores de NYC. Artículos sobre entrenamiento de fuerza, nutrición, recuperación, sueño y técnicas de kettlebell.

about.title: About Us | NYC's Premier Boutique Fitness Concierge | A1 Training Group
about.description: A1 Training Group is NYC's #1 in-home and mobile personal training provider. Founded in 2012, we bring elite fitness directly to your doorstep in Manhattan and the Hamptons.

about.description_es: A1 Training Group es el proveedor #1 de entrenamiento personal móvil y a domicilio en NYC. Fundado en 2012, llevamos fitness de élite directamente a tu puerta.

contact.title: Contact Us | Book Your Free Consultation | A1 Training Group
contact.description: Get in touch with A1 Training Group. Book a free consultation for personal training, physical therapy, or massage therapy. Call (888) 872-2504 or email us.
